hero.label: Marketing Agency
hero.sub: VDH Agency helps businesses grow with proven SEO/SEA strategies, social media management and custom-built websites.

services.label: What we do
services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: Everything you need to grow online, in one place.
services.seoDesc: More visibility in Google with a proven SEO strategy and targeted SEA campaigns that deliver direct results.
services.socialDesc: From the introductory meeting to publication, we handle everything. Content planning, on-location filming and professional video editing — fully taken care of.
services.webDesc: Professional, fast and mobile-friendly websites that convert and rank well in search engines.

about.label: About VDH Agency
about.title: Personal. Committed. Results-driven.
about.p1: VDH Agency was founded by Lars van der Hoek with one goal: to truly grow businesses online. No empty promises, just measurable results.
about.p2: At VDH Agency, I am personally involved in every project. You always have one dedicated point of contact and direct communication — without middlemen.

process.label: How we work
process.title: From introduction to growth
process.s1desc: We discuss your goals, challenges and opportunities in a no-obligation conversation.
process.s2desc: We create a tailor-made plan aligned with your goals and budget.
process.s3desc: We get to work with transparent communication and regular updates.
process.s4desc: We measure results, continuously optimise and scale what works.

cta.label: Ready to grow?
cta.title: Let's take your business to the next level together.
cta.sub: Contact us today for a no-obligation conversation.

dienstenPage.label: Our services
dienstenPage.title: Everything you need to grow online
dienstenPage.sub: From SEO to social media and websites — we deliver measurable results.
dienstenPage.seoDesc: Search engine optimisation (SEO) and paid advertising (SEA) are the backbone of online growth. We analyse your market, optimise your website and set up targeted campaigns that convert visitors into customers.
dienstenPage.socialSubtitle: From idea to publication, we handle everything
dienstenPage.socialDesc: Social media management goes beyond posting occasionally. We handle the entire process: from an introductory meeting to understand your brand, to on-location filming, professional video editing and final publication. Consistency plays a major role — it increases the chance that the algorithm picks up your content more often and shows it to a larger audience.
dienstenPage.webDesc: A good website is fast, mobile-friendly and converts visitors into customers. We build custom websites that not only look great but are also technically optimised for search engines.

overPage.label: About VDH Agency
overPage.title: The story behind VDH Agency
overPage.sub: A passion for digital marketing, a mission to grow businesses.
overPage.storyTitle: Who is Lars van der Hoek?
overPage.p1: I'm Lars van der Hoek, founder of VDH Agency. With a passion for digital marketing I help businesses grow through SEO, social media and custom-built websites.
overPage.p2: At VDH Agency, everything revolves around results. You always work directly with me — no middlemen, no miscommunication, just clear agreements.
overPage.p3: My approach is simple: I get to know your business, set a clear strategy and deliver measurable results. Honest, transparent and results-driven.
overPage.v1desc: We always work with clear KPIs and measurable goals. Results are the only benchmark.
overPage.v2desc: No vagueness or hidden costs. You always know exactly where you stand.
overPage.v3desc: Direct line with Lars. No account managers, no middlemen. Always.

contactPage.label: Contact
contactPage.title: Let's get acquainted
contactPage.sub: Ready to grow your business? Get in touch for a no-obligation conversation.
contactPage.name: Name
contactPage.successDesc: Thank you for your message. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
